phase_in_plan: Milestone C — brain_overlays_v1 bounded non-quant overlay layer
anti_drift_guard: All overlays are structured packets (overlay_type vocabulary = regime_shift / hazard_modifier / invalidation_warning / confidence_adjustment / catalyst_window) with confidence ∈ [0, 1], counter_interpretation_present required to be explicit, and an expiry_or_recheck_rule — no free-narrative AI text.

brain_overlays_v1_module.summary: Defines BrainOverlayV1 / BrainOverlaySeedFileV1 Pydantic models, OVERLAY_TYPES vocabulary, exclusive-or artifact/registry binding check, validate_overlays_against_bundle, summarize_overlays_for_runtime, overlay_influence_lookup, and load_brain_overlays_seed.

bundle_schema.summary: BrainBundleV0 gains optional brain_overlays list; validate_active_registry_integrity now rejects overlays whose artifact_id / registry_entry_id does not match any bundle entity.

bundle_builder_cli.summary: build-metis-brain-bundle-from-factor-validation merges overlays from config.overlays_seed_path (default data/mvp/brain_overlays_seed_v1.json) into the merged bundle, validates bindings, and records per-build overlay report (overlays_seed_found, loaded_count, rejected ids, merged_count).

cockpit_health_cash_out.summary: mvp_brain_gate payload gains brain_overlays_summary (METIS_BRAIN_OVERLAYS_SUMMARY_V1) with total / count_by_type / bounded items list.

today_registry_surface_cash_out.summary: TODAY_REGISTRY_SURFACE_V1 now carries brain_overlay_ids: list[str] so Today cards can show which overlays influence each horizon.

seed.summary: Three bounded overlays (confidence_adjustment, regime_shift, catalyst_window) bound to existing short / medium bundle entities. All have counter_interpretation_present=true and explicit expiry_or_recheck_rule.

bundle_build_v2_reference.summary: Adds overlays_seed_path reference so the opt-in v2 build merges the seed overlays automatically.

tests_added.summary: Ten unit tests covering vocabulary enforcement, confidence bounds, exclusive-or binding, validate_overlays_against_bundle, summary + influence lookup, bundle integrity acceptance vs rejection, seed file binding against the live bundle, and cash-out in cockpit health + Today registry surface.
